items.title: EMERGENCY LANDING FACILITY (ELF) ACTIVATION AT SULTANPUR  ON PURVANCHAL EXPRESSWAY
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence EMERGENCY LANDING FACILITY (ELF) ACTIVATION AT SULTANPUR ON PURVANCHAL EXPRESSWAY Posted On: 23 APR 2026 1:39PM by PIB Delhi The Indian Air Force activated 'Emergency Landing Facility' (ELF) on the Purvanchal Expressway in Uttar Pradesh's Sultanpur District on 22 Apr 26, both by day and night, showcasing its operational capability to bolster its defenc…

items.title: 11th  Joint Defence Committee meeting between India & Egypt held in Cairo
